headline: Reflecting Pool Slashed 🔪💦 Trump Blames Vandals 🧔‍♂️🪓
text: DC Reflecting Pool 🏛️💧 got SLICED 🔪 like a bad DJ set 🎧💥! National Park Service 🏞️👮 says a SHARP KNIFE or RAZOR 🪒⚔️ cut the shiny new liner 🧴🛡️ leaving a 300-FOOT GASH 😱📏! Foam sealant got YEETED 🫧🚮 and 70 fence-post tops 🪵🗑️ were yeeted into the drink like bad tweets 🐦💦! President Trump 🍊👑 raged on CBS 📺: 'VANDALS did it!' and accused someone of dumping FERTILIZER 💩🌱 turning the pool into a green SLIME rave 🟢🕺! Algae bloom 🌿💦 and chipped paint 🎨😭 made it look like a swamp party 🐊🍹 after a $multi-million glow-up 💸✨! Five vandals CUFFED 🚔🔗 and five more got federal TICKETS 🎫😤! NPS gonna DRAIN the pool again after July 4th 🎆🇺🇸 to patch the liner like a busted waterbed 🛏️🛠️! Lincoln Memorial vibes 🗽🕊️ turned into a crime scene 🔍🚨 but Trump promises repairs ASAP ⚡🏗️! Pool built in the 1920s 🕰️ now leaking secrets and bird poop 💩🐦—classic DC drama 📜🔥!
